meaning: v.尖声叫喊,耸人听闻地报道,尖声喊叫n.尖叫,尖声,尖声喊叫
examples: She let out a piercing shriek.
Night-time, trams far away shriek like owls.
Her shriek was dulled by the loud crash of thunder.
You are an appealing mate for a limited window, they shriek, and you must mate!
Shriek as a light airplane flies out of the screen and clips you on the nose!
